Meta.title: ausuhak.com — Korean Student Recruitment Partner for Australian Schools
Meta.description: Wilson Kim (QEAC E240) — 19 years of Australia study consulting + Australian school staff experience. 950+ Korean students placed. Partnership opportunities for Australian institutions.

Hero.subtitle1: 19 years of consulting + Australian school staff experience.
Hero.subtitle2: Wilson Kim (QEAC E240) · 950+ Korean students placed.

WilsonStory.title: Inside-school perspective that typical Korean agencies cannot offer
WilsonStory.intro: Unlike typical Korean agencies that view schools from the outside (catalog-based), Wilson has worked inside Australian schools — meeting admissions officers, faculty, and students directly. This gives unique insight into how students are cared for after enrollment.
WilsonStory.quote: We stay in touch through graduation. Help out whenever they ask. That's how students keep sending wedding invitations years later.
WilsonStory.staffDescription: Korean agencies see schools from "outside" (catalog / partner basis). Wilson saw them from "inside" (staff experience). For students and parents, knowing the inside of a school is the starting point of trust.
WilsonStory.milestone1: Started Australia study consulting (first Korean student case)
WilsonStory.milestone2: QEAC E240 — Australian Government certified consultant
WilsonStory.milestone4: Through COVID / 950+ students placed / lifelong relationships
WilsonStory.careMessage: Typical agencies cover up to enrollment. ausuhak.com follows students through graduation and beyond. Enrollment is the starting point — graduation is the real goal.

Footer.tagline: Wilson Kim · 19 years Australia study consulting + Australian school staff experience · 950+ students placed
